scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
